Korean Botulinum Toxins

Our comprehensive catalog of premium South Korean botulinum toxins. Sourced directly from manufacturers ensuring strictly regulated cold-chain logistics. Available exclusively to licensed medical professionals, clinics, and authorized distributors.

verified Professional Use Only ac_unit Cold-Chain Assured

Available Toxins

Botulax

Hugel

Available in 100U, 200U, and 300U. Highly purified botulinum toxin type A for reliable clinical outcomes.

Innotox

Medytox

World's first liquid injectable form of Botulinum Toxin Type A. Ready to use, no reconstitution required.

Nabota

Daewoong

FDA-approved highly purified botulinum toxin. Known for rapid onset and high patient satisfaction.

Rentox

PharmaResearch

Premium 100U preparation offering excellent diffusion control and sustained efficacy for clinical settings.
